mutation_log.mechanism: Hydrolytic deamination of cytosine removes amino group, converting it to uracil (read as thymine). Hallmark of ancient DNA.
mutation_log.disease_relevance: Can create false KRAS/BRAF mutations if not corrected; associated with UV-induced skin cancer in living cells.

mutation_log.mechanism: 8-oxoguanine formation via reactive oxygen species. Oxidative DNA damage from ancient burial environment.
mutation_log.disease_relevance: Transversion associated with TP53 mutations in lung cancer.

mutation_log.mechanism: Exonuclease activity or strand break re-ligation error.
mutation_log.disease_relevance: Frameshift; analogous to CFTR ΔF508 deletion in cystic fibrosis.

mutation_log.mechanism: Replication slippage or transposable element insertion artefact.
mutation_log.disease_relevance: Frameshift mutations; Huntington's disease is caused by CAG repeat expansion.

mutation_log.mechanism: Replication slippage or transposable element insertion artefact.
mutation_log.disease_relevance: Frameshift mutations; Huntington's disease is caused by CAG repeat expansion.

mutation_log.mechanism: Reverse-strand complement of C→T deamination. Common at 3′ ends.
mutation_log.disease_relevance: Similar to oncogenic point mutations seen in RAS family genes.

mutation_log.mechanism: Hydrolytic deamination of cytosine removes amino group, converting it to uracil (read as thymine). Hallmark of ancient DNA.
mutation_log.disease_relevance: Can create false KRAS/BRAF mutations if not corrected; associated with UV-induced skin cancer in living cells.
